name.namePart: 佛教文化學会十周年北條賢三博士古稀記念論文集刊行会
Bukkyō bunka gakkai 10-shūnen Hōjō Kenzō hakushi koki kinen ronbunshū kankōkai

variant.name: Editorial Committee for the Essays Collected on the Occasion of the Tenth Aniversary of the Research Society of Buddhism and Cultural Heritage and Dr. Hōjō Kenzō’s 70th Birthday
